name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Name_Part_Type
title: R5: Identifying type for this part of the name (e.g. strength part) additional types
description: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.part.type` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.part.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.name.part.type` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.part.type` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.namePart.type` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `MedicinalProduct.name.namePart.type` 1..1 `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.part.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicinalProduct.name.namePart.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.part.type` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.name.part.type` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.
